description_long: This machine gun features a robust, matte-finished metal body with a prominent cylindrical barrel and a large drum magazine mounted beneath the receiver. The weapon is equipped with an integrated bipod for stability during sustained fire, and a fixed, ergonomic stock at the rear, likely made from a durable polymer or composite material. The receiver area includes a visible charging handle and a top-mounted carrying handle, both designed for ease of operation and transport. The front of the gun displays a standard cylindrical barrel with a flash suppressor, and the iron sights consist of a rear aperture and a fixed front post. The overall coloration is a mix of dark gray and brownish tones, with some wear and textural variation suggesting heavy-duty use. The design is utilitarian, optimized for reliability and control in urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavy-duty machine gun with a matte metal body, drum magazine, integrated bipod, and fixed polymer stock, finished in dark gray and brown tones. Features include a cylindrical barrel, carrying handle, and standard iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, including the drum magazine, bipod, fixed stock, and carrying handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical barrel, bipod legs, and the round profile of the drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drum magazine, bipod, and ergonomic stock, with visible details of the receiver and charging handle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the fixed stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with flash suppressor
attribute_stock_design: fixed polymer stock with ergonomic contouring
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: rear aperture with fixed front post
